description:
Join us on Wednesday, April 29, from 4 - 7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a tasting featuring Caymus.

Tasting Fee: $35 per person (Buy a bottle from the tasting, get the tasting fee refunded.)

Featured Wines:

  • Caymus California Cabernet Sauvignon 2023 – $44.99, Winery $55 – Introduced by Caymus Vineyards with the 2021 vintage, this wine is a California-appellation Cabernet Sauvignon - supple, dark and rich, bearing the signature hallmarks of Caymus.
  • Red Schooner by Caymus Voyage 12 – $29.99 – Grapes for this Malbec are grown in the Andes Mountains of Argentina, then chilled and transported by ocean voyage to Caymus, where we use our winemaking techniques to create a style that is dense, dark and supple.
  • Red Schooner by Caymus Transit No. 2 – $39.99, Winery $50 – Red Schooner's new "Red Wine of the World," this red blend is sourced from famed regions of southern Australia, the Barossa Valley and McLaren Vale.
  • Bonanza by Chuck Wagner The Vinekeeper Cabernet Sauvignon – $29.99 – Beautifully balanced - rich, fruit-driven, round and ripe.

Come explore Caymus and find your favorite bottle. Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded.
title: Caymus Tasting at South Creek
